title: Bibu's clear water
description: This resource pack makes the water more transparent.
body:
**Bibu's Clear Water** is a simple and effective resource pack designed to make Minecraft water perfectly transparent. Whether in oceans, rivers, lakes, or even inside your buckets, you'll now enjoy crystal-clear visibility. This pack is ideal for explorers, underwater builders, and anyone who wants to admire the seabed without being hindered by the usual water opacity. Enjoy a clearer and more immersive gaming experience now!

**📌 You can also find me on CurseForge:**

You can find all my creations and updates for this pack on my CurseForge profile : https://www.curseforge.com/members/bibu_044
